Confab: a room of AI advisors for your Mac

Confab is a macOS menubar app for spoken conversations with a room of AI advisors. They talk to you and to each other, out loud, so one viewpoint is never enough. It runs on your own Claude Pro or Max subscription.

Home Why a room License

What it does

  • More than a hundred advisors across nineteen teams, including Software, Marketing, Leadership, Accounting, Legal, Finance, Home & Garden, Consumer Focus Group, and Manufacturing & Operations.
  • Sage moderates and can pull in any team by voice.
  • Speech is understood on-device; the voices are built in; your history stays on your Mac.
  • Requires macOS and an active Claude Pro or Max subscription via the claude CLI. No extra per-token cost.

Get Confab

Buy a license and request early access
